title: Add MIT License to repository
description: Add a proper MIT License file to the repository root, establishing jim.tennis as open-source software. The license should name James Hartt as the copyright holder with the current year. This is a prerequisite for all other open-source readiness work — nothing else in this sprint should land before the license is in place.
acceptance_criteria: LICENSE file exists at repository root containing the full MIT License text
README.md license placeholder replaced with reference to LICENSE file and MIT badge
License is recognised correctly by GitHub's license detection

approach: 1. Create LICENSE file with standard MIT License text
2. Set copyright holder to James Hartt, year range 2025-2026
3. Replace the '[Add your license information here]' placeholder in README.md with an MIT license badge and link to the LICENSE file

testing_requirements: LICENSE file is valid MIT license text
GitHub renders the license badge correctly on the repository page

context.user_story: As the project owner, I want a clear open-source license so that other clubs and developers know exactly what rights they have to use, modify, and distribute this software
